mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_command_audit (request_id, operator_id, target_client_id, target_node_type, command_type, command_text, safety_level, status, confirmed, result_summary) VALUES (#{audit.requestId}, #{audit.operatorId}, #{audit.targetClientId}, #{audit.targetNodeType}, #{audit.commandType}, #{audit.commandText}, #{audit.safetyLevel}, #{audit.status}, #{audit.confirmed}, #{audit.resultSummary})
